title: Output schema of Turkish E-Commerce Review Aggregator
description: The actor stores normalized review records in the default dataset. The dataset also includes a final RUN_SUMMARY record with totals, duration, and error counts.

results.title: Review results
results.description: Unified product review records with sentiment tags for Trendyol, Hepsiburada, and N11, followed by a RUN_SUMMARY dataset item.
